title: decaneurum frutescens
intro: Decaneurum frutescens, also known as Tree Peony or Hu Zhang, is a perennial shrub native to China that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain flavonoids and triterpenoid saponins that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Decaneurum frutescens include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of Decaneurum frutescens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and treat various digestive issues.
